scripts.dev: docker compose up -d && concurrently --names api,web,mobile --prefix-colors cyan,magenta,yellow "uv run --directory services/api uvicorn src.api.main:app --reload --port 8000" "pnpm --filter web dev --host" "pnpm --filter mobile start"
scripts.dev:web: docker compose up -d && concurrently --names api,web --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "uv run --directory services/api uvicorn src.api.main:app --reload --port 8000" "pnpm --filter web dev --host"
scripts.dev:mobile: docker compose up -d && concurrently --names api,mobile --prefix-colors cyan,yellow "uv run --directory services/api uvicorn src.api.main:app --reload --port 8000" "pnpm --filter mobile start"
